metadata.description: AI-First SDLC Practices — plugin family for zero-debt development

plugins.name: sdlc-core
plugins.description: Core SDLC rules, validators, enforcement, and workflows

plugins.name: sdlc-team-common
plugins.description: Cross-cutting specialist agents — architects, researchers, performance engineers

plugins.name: sdlc-team-ai
plugins.description: AI/ML specialist agents — architects, prompt engineers, RAG designers

plugins.name: sdlc-team-fullstack
plugins.description: Full-stack agents — frontend, backend, API, DevOps architects

plugins.name: sdlc-team-cloud
plugins.description: Cloud infrastructure agents — cloud, container, SRE specialists

plugins.name: sdlc-team-security
plugins.description: Security agents — security, compliance, privacy specialists

plugins.name: sdlc-team-pm
plugins.description: Project management agents — agile coach, delivery manager, progress tracking

plugins.name: sdlc-team-docs
plugins.description: Documentation agents — technical writer, documentation architect

plugins.name: sdlc-lang-python
plugins.description: Python-specific validation, patterns, and expert agents

plugins.name: sdlc-knowledge-base
plugins.description: Filesystem-based project knowledge base — librarian agent, hash-tracked indexes, ingest/query/lint operations
